title: Qal‘at Sukkar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Qal‘at Sukkar with a Z-Score of +4.17. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Qal‘at Sukkar has brought extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 13.1 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
